title: Generating a Valid XML Document
scenario: Given a list of elements and attributes, generate a valid XML document with the correct structure and formatting. Ensure the document has a root element, each element has a unique id attribute, and the document follows standard XML syntax.
constraints: Must use a unique id attribute for each element

evaluationCriteria.description: Does the document have the correct structure and formatting?
Are unique id attributes used for each element?
Does the document follow standard XML syntax?
Is the root element correctly implemented?
